response.justification: Bogdan significantly exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 20 years of full-stack experience, currently working as a Staff Engineer doing exactly what the role demands. Strong demonstrated expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. The current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure development, directly matching a specific job requirement. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Jest/Vitest/Playwright, and PostgreSQL experience—all learnable for someone at this level—but these should be discussed during screening.
strengths: Currently working as full-stack engineer with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and actively developing AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows)
Proven expertise with required technologies: AWS CDK, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and 20 years of software engineering across multiple domains
Strong communication and mentoring background (workshops, refactoring dojos, open source contributions) demonstrating collaborative abilities
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Jest, Vitest, or Playwright experience—specific frameworks listed as required in primary stack
PostgreSQL not mentioned despite being listed as a required database technology (only MongoDB and general SQL experience evident)
Resume emphasizes breadth across many languages and frameworks rather than depth in specific testing practices or security/auth domain expertise

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and specific testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright)
Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
